scripts.edge-demo: DATABASE_URL=${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://multiagency:multiagency@localhost:5455/multiagency_test} BOT_TOKEN=000000:demo ADMIN_IDS=1 BOT_USERNAME=DemoBot NEAR_AI_API_KEY= NOTIFY_RATE_PER_SEC=1000 tsx scripts/edge-demo.ts
scripts.rooms-demo: DATABASE_URL=${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://multiagency:multiagency@localhost:5455/multiagency_test} BOT_TOKEN=000000:demo ADMIN_IDS=1 BOT_USERNAME=DemoBot NEAR_AI_API_KEY=demo-stub SIGNAL_MAX_PER_HOUR=3 NOTIFY_RATE_PER_SEC=1000 tsx scripts/rooms-demo.ts
